judgeReasoning: The response satisfies all required rubric points: it explains that `group` organizes navigation, llms.txt sections, search metadata, and AGENTS.md grouping; characterizes `/llms-full.txt` as a single monolithic all-docs file that is not sharded per group; and lists many valid optional fields (icon, deprecated, experimental, canary, new, draft, tags, full, lastModified, lastAuthor). Minor issue: it invents a couple fields (deprecatedReason, availableIn) not on the rubric list, but it includes more than two valid ones.
